initial_draft:

<my name> BLUE </my name>

<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering a very small amount of money. Since I have nothing to offer, accepting this trade is the only way to get anything. Rejecting would result in both of us losing everything. Accepting 1 dollar is better than losing everything. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
